title: Durban, KwaZulu-Natal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Durban, KwaZulu-Natal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Durban is a city in KwaZulu-Natal with a population of 3,442,000. A subtropical coastal city known for its golden beaches, Indian Ocean warmth, and rich Zulu heritage.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
